arts.ttl: Torino drop striker pursuit after Inter demand Ricci in exchange
arts.sum: Torino were persuaded to change their transfer target after Inter requested Samuele Ricci in exchange...

Monza are coming off a 2-0 defeat to Roma on Monday night and have now lost five of their last six games, scoring two goals in the process. Vanja Milinkovic-Savic put on another show for Torino, as h...
